description: Canonical task source of truth. Each task may appear on multiple agile boards via board_refs.

tasks.title: Post artifact pack to mapped channels and pin baselines where allowed.
Configure essential defaults for Carl-bot/sesh/MyRepoBot/Ticket Tool.
Run rollout checker and publish pass report in #iteration-reviews.
Add complete variant-routing examples to protocol docs.
Add compatibility/deprecation matrix and migration notes.
Add operator runbook examples and troubleshooting appendix.
Define App Protocol v2 superset wire spec with v1 backward-compatibility guarantees.
Implement runtime adapter layer (python in-process baseline + process runtime hooks) for protocol v2 execution.
Deliver Python-first protocol v2 process lane (stdio transport + reference worker SDK/client) while keeping v1 behavior unchanged.
Extend app manifest/governance for v2 runtime fields with strict compatibility policy and v1-safe defaults.
Add protocol v1/v2 conformance matrix and CI gates for adapter/runtime compatibility and deterministic render outputs.
Publish v1-to-v2 migration guide and runbook updates for first-party app teams (Python-first, multi-language ready).
Finalize Planes Protocol v0 core schema (app/plane/component contracts, metadata inheritance, unit normalization).
Standardize Planes interaction hooks against HDI-normalized phases and event payload contracts.
Define Planes script registry and deterministic function target resolution (<script_id>::<function_name>) with strict-mode failures.
Specify Planes viewport clipping and scroll-window semantics (coordinate remap, bounds, deterministic pan behavior).
Define Planes Gantt+Agile feature profile and status-theming contract for first-party planning app templates.
Implement deterministic compiler mapping from Planes JSON to shared UI IR (draw/hit-test ordering + frame transforms).
Add Planes strict/permissive schema validation and conformance tests (including v1/v2 protocol integration gates).
Implement first-party Planes runtime loader API (load_plane_app) so apps can run from plane.json without custom compile/render boilerplate.
Refactor planes_v2_poc example to tiny load_plane_app(...) pattern using framework-managed Planes compile/render pipeline.
Add Planes runtime tests/docs for handler dispatch, viewport semantics, and proof command coverage.
Collect and classify top swapchain/surface/fence failure modes.
Add targeted regression tests for each failure class.
Implement resiliency fixes and fallback parity checks.
Run stability soak and publish defect burn-down.
Define deterministic gate ownership and required pass criteria.
Add flaky test quarantine + remediation workflow.
Improve smoke signal visibility and artifact links.
Define retention policy defaults and rationale.
Validate prune/report workflows under realistic load.
Publish operational playbook for retention management.
Assemble milestone completion evidence packet.
Review unresolved risks/defects and required mitigations.
Publish go/no-go recommendation with rationale and decision log links.
Add platform-aware runtime path: macOS windowed + non-macOS headless.
Keep animation/frame behavior identical across platform paths.
Add non-macOS system telemetry providers and unavailable fallbacks.
Update tests/docs and validate no regression in dashboard formatting.
Sideways x-axis rule labels for long names with readable wrapping/fallbacks.
Bar chart renderer support (static + interactive parity).
Multiple plot support (subplot-like layout orchestration).
Scrolling and viewport controls for dense plot surfaces.
acceptance_criteria: Scrolling and viewport behavior is deterministic, clamped, and regression-tested.
evidence_commands: PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_luvatrix_plot.py tests/test_planes_runtime.py -k "scroll or viewport" -q

tasks.title: Table UI component system (sortable columns, pagination/virtualization, keyboard access).
acceptance_criteria: Table sorting, pagination/virtualization, and keyboard flows are deterministic with regression coverage.
evidence_commands: PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_luvatrix_ui_table.py -q

tasks.title: Dynamic data plotting primitives (incremental redraw windows, axis rescale policy, stream cadence hooks).
Financial visualization profile pack (OHLC/candles/volume overlays) for downstream marketbook rendering.
Define and implement native hot-path extraction plan for high-frequency camera/compose operations.
acceptance_criteria: Native hot-path extraction boundaries and rollback/fallback constraints are documented deterministically.
evidence_commands: PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_planes_runtime.py tests/test_planes_v2_poc_example.py -q

tasks.title: Implement CI performance gate pack for camera-scroll, compositor, and frame-budget thresholds.
acceptance_criteria: CI perf gate enforces deterministic camera-scroll/compositor budget checks with reproducible artifacts.
evidence_commands: PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_m008_perf_gate.py -q
PYTHONPATH=. uv run python ops/ci/m008_perf_gate.py --samples 60 --budget-p95-ms 40 --budget-jitter-ms 25

tasks.title: Implement shift-blit camera scroll compose path (translate previous frame + redraw exposed strips only).
acceptance_criteria: Shift-blit compose uses deterministic translation plus exposed-strip redraw without visual regressions.
evidence_commands: PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_window_matrix_protocol.py tests/test_app_runtime.py tests/test_planes_runtime.py -q

tasks.title: Add pre-rasterized bitmap cache path for stable SVG/text components during camera scrolling.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-rasterized bitmap cache path for stable SVG/text components is defined with parity tests and rollback path.
evidence_commands: PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_planes_runtime.py -k "cache or svg" -q

tasks.title: Add frame-paced scroll scheduler (coalesced input -> one render cadence update).
acceptance_criteria: Frame-paced scroll scheduler coalesces input into deterministic render cadence updates.
evidence_commands: PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_planes_runtime.py -k "coalesced or scroll" -q

tasks.title: Decouple input ingestion from render thread using deterministic intent queue handoff.
acceptance_criteria: Input ingestion is decoupled from render via deterministic intent queue handoff with ordering guarantees.
evidence_commands: PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_hdi_thread.py tests/test_planes_runtime.py -k "input or queue or intent" -q

tasks.title: Finalize scroll performance validation pack (latency/jitter budgets + visual artifact regression gates).
acceptance_criteria: Final scroll validation pack enforces latency/jitter budgets and visual artifact regression gates.
evidence_commands: PYTHONPATH=. uv run python tools/perf/run_suite.py --scenario all_interactive --out artifacts/perf/scroll_drag_candidate.json
PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests -k "scroll or viewport or dirty_rect" -q

tasks.title: Calendar app component (day/week/month views + event rendering contract).
Calendar workflow integration with data workspace navigation/state sync.
Marketbook schema + ingestion adapter contract.
Dedicated dynamic marketbook renderer (depth ladder, spread, imbalance traces).
Streaming update strategy + latency/perf budgets.
Regression/safety tests and operator docs.
Define canonical timeline/task schema for Gantt + Agile cards.
Build Luvatrix Gantt renderer (axis/status/dependency lanes).
Build Luvatrix Agile board renderer (columns/swimlanes/blockers).
Add interaction layer (filter/zoom/scroll/click-through).
Add export adapters (ASCII/Markdown/PNG) and Discord payload compatibility.
Add validation suite (render correctness + dependency integrity).
Define Agile source-of-truth contract (tasks master + board registry + data workflow).
Backfill milestone task indexes and create archived task ledger for historical milestones.
Implement milestone-task link validator enforcing active/archived resolution.
Build standardized endpoint-style planning API for safe milestone/task CRUD.
Document planning API usage and verify data-integrity smoke tests.
Consolidate Gantt markdown outputs into a single canonical milestones_gantt.md and retire legacy .txt/.md duplicates.
Wire planning API apply path to auto-regenerate Gantt markdown/detailed markdown/PNG artifacts after successful writes.
Map exact per-frame copy chain across WindowMatrix, DisplayRuntime snapshot, and Vulkan upload stages.
acceptance_criteria: Copy chain documented with stage-by-stage byte movement and ownership boundaries.
evidence_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_app_runtime.py tests/test_display_runtime.py tests/test_planes_runtime.py -q

tasks.title: Add baseline instrumentation counters/timers for copy bytes/count and CPU pack/map/memcpy timings.
acceptance_criteria: Perf telemetry emitted deterministically for all core interactive scenarios.
evidence_commands: uv run python tools/perf/run_suite.py --scenario render_copy_chain --out artifacts/perf/render_copy_baseline.json

tasks.title: Add scenario harness coverage: idle, scroll-heavy, drag-heavy, and resize-stress.
acceptance_criteria: Scenario harness runs reproducibly and exports comparable telemetry artifacts.
evidence_commands: uv run python tools/perf/run_suite.py --scenario all_interactive --out artifacts/perf/interactive_baseline.json

tasks.title: Define baseline perf-gate thresholds and CI guard contracts.
acceptance_criteria: CI gate spec includes fail conditions for copy, latency, and determinism regressions.
evidence_commands: uv run python tools/perf/assert_thresholds.py --suite baseline_contract --baseline artifacts/perf/interactive_baseline.json

tasks.title: Refactor WindowMatrix commit path to avoid full-frame clone for localized writes.
acceptance_criteria: Reduced copy count/bytes with deterministic parity and no frame correctness regressions.
evidence_commands: uv run python tools/perf/run_suite.py --scenario render_copy_chain --out artifacts/perf/render_copy_candidate.json
uv run pytest tests/runtime tests/rendering -k "revision or frame_correctness" -q
tasks.rollback_strategy: Feature flag default-off; retain previous path and allow runtime rollback to legacy behavior.

tasks.title: Introduce safe revisioned or double-buffer snapshot strategy to reduce DisplayRuntime clone overhead.
acceptance_criteria: Reduced copy count/bytes with deterministic parity and no frame correctness regressions.
evidence_commands: uv run python tools/perf/run_suite.py --scenario render_copy_chain --out artifacts/perf/render_copy_candidate.json
uv run pytest tests/runtime tests/rendering -k "revision or frame_correctness" -q
tasks.rollback_strategy: Feature flag + dual-path execution and fast rollback to previous stable implementation on regression detection.
